channel.title: Decantika — All Clones, Designers & Niche Copy
channel.description: Latest clone/designer/niche copy decant listings at Decantika

item.title: Club de Nuit Intense Man Limited Edition - Armaf - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Armaf
Type: Armaf
Price: 2.49

Club de Nuit Intense Man Limited Edition by Armaf

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Inspired by: Aventus by Creed

 
Scent profile:


 

Fragance Notes:

- Top: Pineapple, Lemon, Bergamot, Lime, Black Pepper, Pink Pepper

- Heart: Jasmine, Rose, Lily of the Valley, Freesia

- Base: White Musk, Leather, Ambroxan, Cedar, Ambergris, Patchouli

 

Information:

Concentration: Parfum

Olfactive Notes: Fruity, Citrus, Woody, Leather, Patchouli, Sweet, Smoky, Vanilla, Rose

Target Gender: Men

Recommended for: Versatile. All seasons

 

Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

item.title: Club de Nuit Iconic Extrait - Armaf - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Armaf
Type: Armaf
Price: 2.49

Club de Nuit Iconic Extrait by Armaf

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Inspired by: Bleu de Chanel (Higher oil concentration)

 
Scent profile:


 

Fragance Notes:

- Top: Grapefruit, Pink Pepper, Lemon, Mint, Coriander

- Heart: Ginger, Melon, Jasmine, Nutmeg

- Base: Incense, Woody Notes, Sandalwood, Amber, Cedar, Patchouli, Labdanum

 

Information:

Concentration: Extrait de Parfum

Olfactive Notes: Woody, Amber, Citrus, Fresh Spicy, Aromatic, Warm Spicy, Balsamic, Soft Spicy, Smoky, Fresh

Target Gender: Men

Recommended for: Versatile. All seasons

 

Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

item.title: Absolute Chill - Atralia - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Atralia
Type: Atralia
Price: 1.99

Absolute Chill by Atralia

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Inspired by: Pacific Chill by Louis Vuitton

 

 

Scent profile:

 

 

Fragance Notes:

- Top: Mint, Blackcurrant, Orange, Lemon

- Heart: Coriander, White Tea, Basil

- Base: Musk, Ambergris, Moss

 

Information:

Concentration: Eau De Parfum

Olfactive Notes: Amber, Vanilla, Aromatic, Sweet, Green, Fresh Spicy, Lavender, Powdery

Target Gender: Unisex

Recommended for: Cold Temperatures. Fall, Winter, Spring


Disclaimer:

Decantika is an independent decanting service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any brand or designer. All decants are rebottled from 100% authentic, original fragrances into smaller spray bottles for sampling and personal use only.

item.title: Nitro Platinum - Dumont - 1ml Decant Spray Sample
item.description:
Vendor: Dumont
Type: Dumont
Price: 1.99

Nitro Platinum by Dumont

1ml Decant Spray Sample

Pineapple forward scent

 

 

Scent Profile:

 

 

Fragrance Notes:

Top: Blackcurrant, Orange, Apple, Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Cardamom

Heart: Vanilla, Sugar, Amber, Dry Wood, Saffron, Lily of the Valley

Base: Vanilla, Amber, Cedarwood, Cedar, Moss, Musk, Guaiac Wood

 

Info:

Concentration: Eau De Parfum

Olfactive Family: Citrus, Amber, Aromatic, Sweet, Fresh Spicy, White Floral, Warm Spicy, Green, Animalic, Fruity

Target Gender: Men

Recommended for: Versatile Temperatures.
